## Problem

Describe the behavior or contract this change addresses.

## Change

Explain the implementation and any public API, schema, compatibility, security,
or performance impact.

## Verification

List the exact commands and environments used.

- [ ] Focused tests cover the change.
- [ ] `cargo fmt --check` passes.
- [ ] Applicable workspace, documentation, distribution, and site checks pass.
- [ ] New dependencies and redistributed assets have been reviewed.
- [ ] Documentation and diagnostics match the implemented behavior.
